seoTitle: Mannering Park vs Mannus — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Mannering Park and Mannus. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Mannering Park vs Mannus: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Mannering Park and Mannus.
heading: Mannering Park vs Mannus — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Mannering Park, New South Wales and Mannus, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mannering Park has a lower overall climate risk score (40/100) compared to Mannus (41/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Mannering Park or Mannus safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Mannering Park has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Mannus scores 50/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Mannering Park scores 39/100 for bushfire risk. Mannus scores 45/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Mannering Park or Mannus?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mannering Park has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
